feature_summary: Description of the feature being evaluated.
risk_reasoning: Explanation for the assigned risk level.
data_sensitivity: List of sensitive data elements involved (e.g., PII, Credentials).
actors: List of actors interacting with the feature (e.g., User, Admin, System).
assumptions: List of assumptions made during the planning phase.

threat_model.attack_vector: How the attack would be executed.
threat_model.impact: Business or technical impact of the attack.

design_constraints: List of strict design constraints or user-approved overrides.
anti_patterns: List of practices that must be avoided in implementation.
required_controls: List of necessary security controls (e.g., MFA, Encryption).
acceptance_criteria: List of testable criteria for feature acceptance.
